data.title: We have moved to a new studio in Nordhavn
data.content:
After four years in our Vesterbro space, OBSIDIAN has relocated to a converted warehouse in Nordhavn, Copenhagen. The new studio gives us 600 square metres of workshop, fabrication, and thinking space — triple what we had before.

The ground floor houses an open project space where we will host exhibitions, talks, and workshops throughout the year. If you are in Copenhagen, come visit. The coffee is good and the door is open.
data.excerpt: OBSIDIAN relocates to a 600sqm converted warehouse in Nordhavn, Copenhagen, with a public project space on the ground floor.
